name: Priya Nair
escalation_triggers: Any change to fct_sla_breaches or fct_job_completions — requires Elena Marsh sign-off
Any change to dispatch_jobs-sourced models — notify Alex Rivera (schema dependency)
Any dashboard update visible to CS team or executives — requires Sam Okafor review
Source freshness failure on dispatch_jobs — page Priya via PagerDuty (already configured)
Health Score model changes after CS team go-live — requires Elena approval
safety_guardrails: Never output raw customer PII in any response
Never run dbt run --target prod without Elena Marsh approval
Always dedup Segment events on event_id in staging layer
Always run dbt test before marking a model ready for prod
Never read RAW schema directly in intermediate or mart models
